text:
There once was a little red engine named Rusty. Rusty doted on his orange paint. One day, while chuffing along the tracks, Rusty came across a pile of treasures. There were old shoes, a shiny pocket watch, and golden coins all mingled together. Rusty, full of joy, collected everything.

The next morning, Rusty held his little chest tightly. He was pondering what to do with these riches when Sodor rolled by. Sir Topham Hatt noticed Rusty's excitement and asked what he'd found.

"It's a collection of old treasures!" Rusty bellowed.

"The golden coins?" Sir Topham Hatt asked.

"Yeah! They're very shiny," Rusty beamed.

"Now, now Rusty," said Sir Topham Hatt. "Let's see how we can help you share these good things with others. We could start a museum, or maybe put them to good use in the village!"
